That seems actually a very

interesting project. So let's talk about websockets, right? So obviously there is a back and forth chat so and there is low latency requirements as well, right? So we'll start from there and we'll discuss more on top of it. >> . so what websockets or socket oi does is it creates a persistent connection between the two users if it it's a broadcasting if I am sending something and the other person would eventually get the message and in the normal API we have to ask for the request get request whenever I am available I will fetch the request and I will get the message but on the other hand so what socket does is it creates a persistent connection where you will eventually get your message if you are online or not. >> Awesome.
